overall.description: Static first-person view from a video game showing a campfire burning inside a canvas tent or temporary shelter. The scene features warm firelight illuminating camping equipment and tent walls, with flickering flames providing the only motion in the otherwise still environment.

agents.ego_description: sitting stationary by the campfire, observing the flames and the tent interior

entered.detail: burning fire with flickering orange flames and glowing embers surrounded by stones
tan canvas tent walls with visible seams and wooden pole supports
large white and brown fur pelt hanging on the tent wall
metal cooking vessel sitting near the fire
cylindrical white lantern or container next to the cooking pot
vertical wooden poles supporting the tent structure

segments.scene_description: A static first-person view inside a canvas tent illuminated by a central campfire. The warm firelight casts dancing shadows on the tent walls and highlights a large animal hide hanging to the right and cooking equipment to the left. The scene remains completely still except for the natural flickering of the flames.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective inside a canvas shelter, where the atmosphere is defined by the steady, rhythmic pulse of a central campfire. It begins with the warm firelight casting dancing shadows across the fabric walls, creating a sense of enclosed intimacy. As the flames flicker, the light shifts to highlight a large animal hide hanging to the right and various cooking equipment positioned to the left. The scene remains poised in a state of stillness, with the only movement being the natural, undulating glow of the fire illuminating the rustic interior.
